sections.paragraph:
χωρισμός, οῦ, ὁ (χωρίζω; Aristot. et al.; Diod S 2, 60, 1; in pap freq. of divorce [s. Preis. s.v.]; LXX) division (Tat. 13, 2 [soul fr. spirit]; Ath., R. 16 p. 67, 31 χ. ψυχῆς ἀπὸ τοῦ σώματος [so Pla., Phd. 67d, of death]; Hierocles, 24, p. 472 ὁ ἀπὸ θεοῦ χ.) of the situation in the early church οὐκ ἦν χ. αὐτοῖς there was no division among them Ac 4:32 v.l.—DELG s.v. χώρα. Sv.

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

freq. freq. = frequent(ly)

Preis. Preis. = FPreisigke, Wörterbuch der griech. Papyrusurkunden—Lists 4, 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Tat Tat , II a.d.—List 5

  1. fr. = from

Ath. Ath. = Athenagoras, II a.d.—List 5

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

Hierocles Hierocles , Commentarius in aureum carmen, V a.d.—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

Sv Sv (at the end of entries)=HSieben, Voces—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1095
